data.description:
Crash/concurrency safety without a multi-event transaction.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Globally-unique run_id (UUID/HLC); WORKFLOW_STEP marker committed AFTER the effect; forward-only recovery (effect-without-marker = applied).
- [ ] (run_id, step_id) handed to non-idempotent downstream APIs as their idempotency token.
- [ ] now()/uuid4()/random()/live reads captured once and persisted in WORKFLOW_STEP; TTL orphan-tmpdir sweep.
Files: src/rebar/llm/workflow/executor.py
data.title: WS-C3: Run identity + idempotency + snapshot TTL sweep
